tasks.name: Performance monitor
tasks.description: Compares strategies per ticker and ranks them weekly to determine which earns the live trading slot. Classifies market conditions and tracks performance across different environments.

tasks.name: Comparison reports
tasks.description: Weekly and monthly side-by-side strategy comparison with market condition context. Shows which strategies perform best in trending, choppy, and volatile markets.

tasks.name: Telegram reorganization
tasks.description: Split one noisy notification chat into 5 dedicated channels organized by type - errors, approvals, lifecycle, trading activity, and reports.

tasks.name: GitHub pages
tasks.description: Moved the site from a local file to a live hosted platform. Automated scanning ensures code quality on every update.

tasks.name: Site auto-updater
tasks.description: Automatically refreshes all site numbers twice daily from live database queries and security scans. Also triggers on code commits for real-time updates.

tasks.name: Per-ticker risk sizing
tasks.description: Different risk percentages per asset - lower risk on volatile or speculative coins, higher on established ones like BTC and ETH. Adapts position sizing to match each asset's risk profile.

tasks.name: Cross-ticker correlation
tasks.description: Track whether strategies on different tickers are actually diversified or winning and losing together. Prevents overexposure to correlated assets when scaling to multiple live strategies.

tasks.name: Market regime switching
tasks.description: Bots adapt their behavior based on current market conditions - reduce trading in choppy markets, stay active in trends, sit out during high volatility events. Preserves capital when conditions are unfavorable.

tasks.name: Mobile responsiveness
tasks.description: Full review and fixes so the entire site works cleanly on phones and tablets. Every section, animation, and interactive element optimized for touch and small screens.

tasks.name: Strategy retirement automation
tasks.description: Automated detection and removal of strategies that consistently underperform. Frees up ticker slots for better-performing strategies without manual monitoring.

tasks.name: Market regime switching
tasks.description: Bots adapt their behavior based on current market conditions - reduce trading in choppy markets, stay active in trends, sit out during high volatility events.

tasks.name: On-chain data integration
tasks.description: Exchange inflows and outflows, funding rates, and whale wallet movements as additional market intelligence signals. Adds a layer of insight beyond just price and volume data.

tasks.name: Sub-accounts
tasks.description: Multiple exchange accounts so more than one strategy per ticker can trade live simultaneously. Scales the portfolio beyond the current one-strategy-per-ticker limit.

tasks.name: Cloud deployment
tasks.description: Move from desktop to cloud servers for 24/7 uptime without depending on a home PC being powered on. Eliminates downtime from power outages and restarts.

tasks.name: Disaster recovery
tasks.description: Automated database backups to cloud storage on a schedule. Protects years of strategy data, trade history, and candle data from hardware failure.

tasks.name: Strategy marketplace
tasks.description: Subscription service selling proven trade signals to paying users. The ecosystem generates revenue from strategies with verified live trading track records.

tasks.name: Multi-exchange support
tasks.description: Expand beyond Blofin to other exchanges for better liquidity and redundancy. Same strategies, different execution venues.

tasks.name: Multi-asset expansion
tasks.description: Apply the same autonomous pipeline to forex, stocks, and commodities. Different data sources and market hours, same proven architecture.
